name: Stripe new subscription → 5-email welcome sequence + Slack notify

parameters.subject: =Welcome to {{$json.product_name}} — what happens next
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{$json.customer_name || 'there'}},

Thank you for subscribing to {{$json.product_name}}. I'm Nicholas Templeman, solo UK founder of MEOK AI Labs. You'll hear from me directly — not a sales rep.

Next 24 hours:

  1. Email with your subscription details + access links arrives within 1 hour
  2. I'll personally book your onboarding call within 24h
  3. If you don't hear from me by then, reply to this email — direct founder access

What's included in your subscription:

  • Pre-built compliance templates (delivered as ZIP within 1 hour)
  • HMAC-signed quarterly self-attestations
  • 30-min/quarter live consult call
  • Slack/email support for new regulatory updates

If you want to chat sooner, my Calendly is cal.com/networknick — pick any slot.

Welcome aboard.

— Nicholas Templeman
Founder, MEOK AI Labs
CSOAI LTD · UK Companies House 16939677

parameters.subject: Quick check-in — your {{$json.product_name}} working well?
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{$json.customer_name || 'there'}},

You subscribed yesterday — quick check that everything works.

Three things to confirm:

  1. Did the welcome email + ZIP arrive?
  2. Have you booked your onboarding call yet? (cal.com/networknick)
  3. Any specific question I can answer right now?

Reply to this email — I read every one.

— Nicholas

parameters.subject: Day 7 — first quarterly attestation cert ready when you are
parameters.html:
=

Hi,

You've had {{$json.product_name}} for a week. Quick reminder of what's available:

  • First signed quarterly attestation — generated when you fill in the 6-section template (link in welcome email). Takes 20 min once you have your AI Tool Register populated.
  • Onboarding call — if not yet booked: cal.com/networknick
  • Slack channel — reply 'add me to slack' if you want direct access for ongoing questions

Anything I can do to make this more useful?

— Nicholas

parameters.subject: Month 1 review — anything we should change?
parameters.html:
=

Hi,

You've been with {{$json.product_name}} 30 days. I aim to make the second month better than the first.

Three quick questions (reply with whatever):

  1. Was the first quarterly attestation useful in any specific decision/conversation?
  2. What's missing from the templates that you wish was in there?
  3. Would you recommend us to one other person? (If yes, intro = 30% rev share to you for life of the customer)

If something hasn't worked, my apologies — say so and we'll fix it. 30-day money-back is still active if you want out.

— Nicholas

_meok_notes.purpose: Onboard every new paying customer with founder-direct emails over the first 30 days. Reduces churn + drives referrals.
_meok_notes.covers_all_meok_products: Care Home Pack, Pro tier, Audit-Prep Bundle, Article 50 kit, NIS2-DE kit, Bias Detection, Transparency
_meok_notes.expected_uplift: 30-day churn reduction by 20-40%; referrals from email 4 (Day 30) drive ~5-10% of compounding new revenue
